narrative:
Precinct Proctorville (precinct in Lawrence County) has 362 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
